info.title: Clockia API v1
info.description: Versioned API for business-scoped reservation operations.

get.summary: List weekly availability configuration for a business
get.description: Returns weekly availability rules configured for resources that belong to the business.

get.summary: List configured blocks for a business
get.description: Returns configured resource blocks scoped to the business in the URL.
Returns a paginated resource collection scoped to the business in the URL.

post.summary: Create a resource for a business

get.description: Returns a paginated service collection scoped to the business in the URL.

post.summary: Create a service for a business

message.example: This service cannot be deleted because it has related reservations.

description.example: Recurso físico para atención o servicio.

message.example: This resource cannot be deleted because it has related availabilities, blocks or reservations.

resource_id.description: If null the block applies to the entire business.

date.description: Punctual date. Mutually exclusive with start_date/end_date when is_recurring is false.

tags.name: Availabilities
